5. When the task is complete, signal completion

Be efficient — avoid unnecessary actions. If something fails, try an alternative approach rather than repeating the same action.

  → Search pattern on this site...

        - link "npm" [ref=e118]:

          - img "npm"
      - paragraph: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows -- all through natural language commands. Use it in your terminal, IDE, or tag @claude on Github.
      - paragraph:
        - strong:
          - text: Learn more in the
          - link "official documentation" [ref=e119]:

      - paragraph: Note

        - text: For more installation options, uninstall steps, and troubleshooting, see the

          - paragraph: "Install Claude Code:"

          - button "Copy" [ref=e123]
          - paragraph:
            - strong: "Homebrew (MacOS/Linux):"
          - text: brew install --cask claude-code
          - button "Copy" [ref=e124] [nth=1]
          - paragraph:
            - strong: "Windows (Recommended):"
          - text: irm https://claude.ai/install.ps1 | iex
          - button "Copy" [ref=e125] [nth=2]
          - paragraph:
            - strong: "WinGet (Windows):"
          - text: winget install Anthropic.ClaudeCode

          - button "Copy" [ref=e127] [nth=4]
        - listitem:
          - paragraph:
            - text: Navigate to your project directory and run
